onset.Description: Event onset from the beginning of the recording.

sample.Description: Zero-based sample index corresponding to event onset.

trial_type.Description: Categorical event label recoded from EEGLAB event type.

Levels.boundary: EEGLAB boundary event marking a discontinuity in the recording.

TaskDescription: Participants responded based on stimulus color while ignoring word meaning, with congruent, incongruent, and neutral trials. More detailed task information is available at https://osf.io/8cbua/.
